D1 Optics L5 Evaluate Reference

Frustrated TIR — Optical Tunneling

bring a second prism within an evanescent length and watch light tunnel across the gap

When a second glass surface comes within an evanescent decay length of the TIR interface, the field tunnels across the air gap — frustrated total internal reflection.

Slide the gap from 0 (perfect contact, full transmission) to ~600 nm (gap larger than d_p, near-total reflection). Slide θ to change the penetration depth.
